# TenantIQ

> AI-powered Microsoft 365 security, compliance, and cost intelligence platform for Managed Service Providers (MSPs).

TenantIQ is the unified control plane for MSPs managing Microsoft 365 tenants. It combines AI-driven security monitoring, CIS benchmark automation, license optimization, and compliance reporting into a single platform.

## Key Capabilities

- **CIS Benchmark Automation**: 100+ CIS controls with automated scanning, scoring, and one-click remediation for Microsoft 365 environments
- **AI Security Agent**: 13+ specialized AI tools for natural language queries across tenants — find inactive users, detect license waste, assess security posture
- **License Optimization**: AI-powered detection of unused seats, duplicate assignments, and wrong tiers with automated cost savings
- **Compliance Frameworks**: SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, and Zero Trust compliance mapping with automated evidence collection and audit-ready PDF reports
- **Threat Detection**: Real-time anomaly detection, email security analysis, and behavior analytics powered by AI
- **Auto-Remediation**: One-click fixes with dry-run preview and full rollback support — Enable MFA, revoke sessions, block risky IPs, downgrade licenses
- **User Lifecycle Management**: Automated onboarding/offboarding workflows with 10 Microsoft Graph actions
- **Multi-Tenant Architecture**: Manage unlimited Microsoft 365 tenants from one dashboard with full data isolation
- **Workflow Automation**: 25 pre-built templates for user onboarding, license reclamation, security remediation, and compliance reporting

## Use Cases

- MSPs managing 10–500+ Microsoft 365 tenants
- IT teams enforcing CIS benchmarks across Azure AD and Microsoft 365
- Compliance officers preparing for SOC 2, HIPAA, or GDPR audits
- Finance teams reducing Microsoft 365 license spend by 20–40%
- Security teams detecting and responding to identity-based threats

## Pricing

- **Starter**: $49/tenant/month — Up to 9 tenants, 100+ CIS controls, security dashboard, basic reporting
- **Professional**: $99/tenant/month — Up to 25 tenants, AI Agent, auto-remediation, compliance frameworks, workflow automation
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — Unlimited tenants, SSO/SAML, white-label, SLA guarantee, dedicated CSM

Volume discounts available: from $45/tenant/month at 50+ tenants.
14-day free trial. No credit card required.

## Technical Stack

- **Frontend**: SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 on Cloudflare Pages
- **API**: Cloudflare Workers + Hono (70+ API routes)
- **Database**: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite)
- **AI**: Anthropic Claude API for security analysis and optimization
- **Identity**: Microsoft OAuth + JWT authentication
- **Integrations**: Microsoft Graph API, ConnectWise, Datto, Kaseya

## Competitors

TenantIQ vs CoreView, Syskit Point, BetterCloud:
- **Differentiator**: AI-native analysis + MSP-first per-tenant pricing (not per-user)
- **Unique**: Built-in AI agent with 13+ tools for natural language security queries
- **Advantage**: One-click CIS remediation with rollback, not just reporting
